191 F0500E_GRP_ACTVTY_CD F0500E_GRP_ACTVTY_CD F0500E Interview for Activity Preferences: Group Activity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how important it is that they do things with groups of people while they are a resident in the current facility. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Very important
2=Somewhat important
3=Not very
